About Flannery's

A home built on warmth, family & trust

Nestled in the peaceful village of Abbeyknockmoy, Tuam, Flannery's Nursing Home is a family-run care home where every resident is treated as one of our own.

Our care plans are built around the individual — their routines, preferences, and personality. Our team share a single purpose: to support residents to live well, with dignity and independence, every single day.

Our care

Personalised care for every stage of life

We offer a range of care options, all delivered with compassion and expertise by our dedicated team.

01

Long-term care

Permanent residential care in a warm, homely environment. Fair Deal funded placements welcomed.

Learn more →
02

Respite care

Short-term stays for temporary care or to give family carers a well-earned break. TCF and private placements available.

Learn more →
03

Dementia care

Specialist support for residents living with dementia, delivered with patience and deep understanding.

Learn more →
Life here

Every day is an opportunity to live well

From morning teas to afternoon activities, residents enjoy life at their own pace in a community that feels like family.
